study_title: Apis mellifera Transcriptome or Gene expression
exp_title: RNAseq of Apis mellifera capensis: fat body tissue
design: Library preparation using the illumina  TruSeq RNA Library Prep Kit (Illumina, San Diego CA) and sequencing on an illumina  HiSeq4000 were done at the Beijing Genomics Institute (BGI) in Hong Kong, China.
sample_description: extracted RNA from 3 individuals pooled for sequencing

study_title: Mandibular Gland transcriptome of African honey bees
exp_title: RNA-seq of Apis mellifera scutellata: day 10 Mandibular gland
design: Total RNA was isolated using TRIZol and treated with DNase. RNA quality and quantity was measured using a Nanodrop 2000 and samples sent for sequencing at BGI in Hong Kong. All samples had QC Class A classification with RIN on >7.4. cDNA libraries were constructed using the Illumina TRISeq RNA Preparation kit generating 100 bp paired ended fragments.
